LanguageData.ABY_CircleRitual_Dominion_Desc: Consumes one dominion sigil and uses the full circle lattice to bootstrap the Crowned Gate crisis core. Package 2 expands the ritual into a live anchorfall objective phase with spawned dominion anchors, local infrastructure pressure, and real on-map targets to destroy.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleRitual_Dominion_Rewards: • Initializes the endgame crisis framework in-world • Spawns the first real dominion objectives on the map • Adds anchor tracking, local debuffs, and objective pressure the later packages will escalate with waves and the Gate core
LanguageData.ABY_CircleRitual_Dominion_SideEffects: • Requires full stabilizer coverage and both capacitor bays online • Blocks other abyssal encounters while the crisis core is active • Anchor types now pressure turrets, power, contamination, and objective time instead of only sitting in standby
LanguageData.ABY_CircleConsoleSubtitleDominion: Dominion crisis core active. Current state: {0}.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionRitualMeta: Sigils on map: {0} • Crisis state: {1} • Challenge tier: endgame
LanguageData.ABY_DominionRitualMetaActive: Sigils on map: {0} • Crisis state: {1} • Anchors: {2} • Pressure: {3}
LanguageData.ABY_DominionCrisisConfirmAbort: Abort the dominion crisis core on this map? This ends the current staging window and marks the run as cancelled.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionCrisisStartDesc: {0} has entered first-stage dominion synchronization. The breach core is unstable but not yet fully unfolded.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionCrisisAnchorfallDesc: {0} has progressed into anchorfall. {1} dominion anchors have materialized across the map and are now feeding the breach. Destroy them before the timer collapses.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionCrisisStandbyDesc: {0} is now holding a live dominion standby state. Later crisis packages will turn this into the full multi-phase encounter; for now the colony is sustaining the armed core.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionCrisisCancelledDesc: The dominion crisis core was intentionally shut down. Outcome: {0}
LanguageData.ABY_DominionCrisisCompletedDesc: The active dominion anchors were destroyed and the current package objective was completed. Outcome: {0}
LanguageData.ABY_DominionCrisisFailedDesc: The dominion crisis core destabilized before the later packages could take over. Failure reason: {0}
LanguageData.ABY_DominionCrisisReminderAnchors: {0} / {1} dominion anchors remain active. Collapse window in {2}.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionCrisisFail_NoCircle: No valid summoning circle is available for dominion synchronization.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionCrisisFail_AlreadyActive: A dominion crisis core is already active on this map.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionCrisisFail_NoResearch: Dominion gate bootstrapping has not been researched yet.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionCrisisFail_Stabilizers: Dominion staging requires a full stabilizer ring. Installed: {0} / {1}.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionCrisisFail_Capacitors: Dominion staging requires both capacitor bays online. Installed: {0} / {1}.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionCrisisFail_CircleLost: The source summoning circle was lost.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionCrisisFail_Power: The source summoning circle lost power for too long.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionCrisisFail_WindowExpired: The package-1 dominion standby window expired.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionCrisisFail_AnchorsPersisted: The dominion anchors were not destroyed before the collapse timer expired.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionCrisisFail_NoAnchorCell: No valid map cells were available for the dominion anchors.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionCrisisFail_AnchorRemnants: The map still contains {0} active dominion anchors from an unfinished breach.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionCrisisAbortFail_NoActive: No dominion crisis core is active on this map.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionAnchorPreviewSummaryIdle: No dominion anchors are active on this map yet. Once synchronization completes, anchorfall will seed multiple objectives around the colony.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionAnchor_ConsoleIdle: No anchor roles are active yet. The breach is still synchronizing.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionAnchor_ConsoleCleared: All known anchor roles on this map have been neutralized.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionAnchor_Effect_Suppression: lashes nearby player turrets with EMP pressure
LanguageData.ABY_DominionAnchor_Effect_Drain: bleeds nearby powered infrastructure and adds contamination
LanguageData.ABY_DominionAnchor_Effect_Breach: accelerates collapse timing and pushes extra contamination
